UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight Odin's calm, transcendent face and his bond with Yggdrasil, the world tree.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the rope binding Odin's ankle as a symbol of suffering, instead focus on his surrender as a form of wisdom.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Hanged_Man card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic, orchestral, harp, strings, ethereal, minor, introspective, instrumental

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the eternal torment, frustration, and denial of Tantalus as a symbol for unfulfilled desires and the consequences of hubris.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the mocking or sly aspects of the card, focusing instead on the deeper themes of punishment and unquenchable longing.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Hanged_Man card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, mystical, contemplative, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Hanged_Man card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the defiant spirit of Prometheus, his sacrifice for humanity, and the ongoing struggle symbolized by the eagle's relentless peck.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the graphic imagery of pain and violence. Instead, focus on the deeper themes of selflessness, endurance, and the human spirit.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Hanged_Man card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, suspense, ethereal, contemplative, instrumental
